title: Ultimate Stuff
description: This mod adds amazing stuff, mainly multiple upgrades beyond netherite gear.  It also adds a few really cool mobs, dimensions, and two biomes.  Ultimate Mods Merch: https://ultimate-mods.printify.me/
body:
This mod adds amazing stuff, mainly multiple upgrades beyond netherite gear.  It also adds a few really cool mobs, dimensions, and two biomes.  The order of upgrades is currently diamond, netherite, death, life, kindness, love, ancient, technology, VR, dragon.  REMEMBER: I did not make diamond or netherite, those were made by Mojang (the company that develops Minecraft.  Mojang is owned by Microsoft.)
This mod was made by CarlGamer2024, the owner of Ultimate mods.

[Channel Link](https://www.youtube.com/@UltimateMods2024)

Ultimate Mods Merch: [Merch Link](https://ultimate-mods.printify.me/)


![The Ultimate Mods Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae9858f69d28aba3442d549336c1e61d3056fdd2.jpeg)
